transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thank you for calling BrightSmile Aesthetics, this is Ava, our after-hours assistant. How can I help you tonight?

transcript.speaker: lead
transcript.text: Hi! I'm interested in veneers. I have a wedding coming up in about six weeks and I wanted to know if it's even possible in time, and whether you offer financing.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Congratulations on the wedding! Veneers before then is absolutely doable — the process usually takes two to three visits over about three weeks. Are you thinking a full smile, around eight to ten teeth, or just the front few?

transcript.speaker: lead
transcript.text: Probably the top front ones, however many show when I smile. I want it to look really natural for the photos.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Perfect, that's exactly what we specialize in. And on financing — we offer 0% APR for 18 months on cosmetic treatment, so you can spread it out. Would mornings or afternoons work better for a consult this week?

transcript.speaker: lead
transcript.text: Oh that's great. Afternoons are better for me. Honestly if it can be done in time I'm ready to book a consult.
